subtitle.zh: 我如何將 AI 整合進真實的軟體開發流程。
subtitle.en: How I integrate AI into real software development.

note.zh: AI 協助實作；架構、決策與品質仍由工程師負責。
note.en: AI assists implementation; architecture, decisions, and quality remain human responsibilities.

description.zh: 從業務目標與使用者場景出發，釐清真正的問題。
description.en: Start from business goals and user scenarios to clarify the real problem.

description.zh: 拆解功能邊界、非功能需求與技術約束。
description.en: Break down functional scope, non-functional requirements, and technical constraints.

description.zh: 定義模組邊界、資料流與技術選型——這一步由人主導。
description.en: Define module boundaries, data flow, and technology choices — human-led.

description.zh: 將架構轉為 API 契約、介面定義與實作指引。
description.en: Translate architecture into API contracts, interfaces, and implementation guides.

description.zh: 在明確規格下，以 AI 加速重複性程式碼與樣板產出。
description.en: With clear specs, use AI to accelerate boilerplate and repetitive code.

description.zh: 審查 AI 產出是否符合架構原則與程式品質標準。
description.en: Review AI output against architecture principles and code quality standards.

description.zh: 消除技術債、統一模組介面、提升可測試性。
description.en: Eliminate tech debt, unify module interfaces, improve testability.

description.zh: 驗證核心路徑、邊界條件與整合行為。
description.en: Verify core paths, edge cases, and integration behavior.

description.zh: 部署、監控並將知識傳承給團隊。
description.en: Deploy, monitor, and transfer knowledge to the team.
